creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: cpm
Date: Thu Oct  6 13:07:13 UTC 2016
New revision: 423404
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/423404

Log:
  [NEW PORT] editors/ecce: Edinburgh Compatible Context Editor

  This is a port of ECCE (the Edinburgh Compatible Context Editor). Now
  really quite ancient, it is still a favourite among many graduates of
  Edinburgh University.

  WWW: http://www.gtoal.com/ecce/

  PR:		212597
  Submitted by:	bob@eager.cx (maintainer)
  Approved by:	amdmi3 (mentor)

Changes:
  head/editors/Makefile
  head/editors/ecce/
  head/editors/ecce/Makefile
  head/editors/ecce/distinfo
  head/editors/ecce/files/
  head/editors/ecce/files/patch-ecce.c
  head/editors/ecce/pkg-descr
  head/editors/ecce/pkg-plist
